feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /news/ News: JUST NO WEIGH PHOTOGENIC FEMALE PRIME MINISTER CAN PHOTO FIGHT 400LBS FAT FRENCH FRY F**K t-Rump
entry.content: https://www.nbcnews.com/world/italy /trump-italy-meloni-begged-photo-fa bricated-g7-summit-france-rcna35083 6 Trump and Italy’s Giorgia Meloni escalate war of words over G7 photo claims The feud showed no signs of cooling on Saturday, as Meloni fired back at Trump: “My popularity is none of your concern. I suggest you focus on yours.” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DxL JnxAuVtI FRIES

entry.title: /news/ News: Tulsi Gabbard accuses Fauci of Wuhan lab COVID cover-up
entry.content: https://abcnews4.com/news/nation-wo rld/gabbard-drops-trove-of-files-be fore-leaving-office-covid-19-fauci- alleged-involvement-congress-taxpay er-dollars Outgoing Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard released a long list of files this week detailing Dr. Anthony Fauci’s role in the COVID-19 pandemic. Including allegations, he lied to Congress about gain-of-function research, influenced assessments on the origins of COVID-19, and "provided millions in U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund dang

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Merge correctly.
entry.content: Traffic is caused by assholes trying to skip the line and merging at the very end, causing cascading braking that travels down the line. You have plenty of warning that a merge is coming up, so move over as soon as you can. Don't come in here talking about some reddit faggotry like "muh zipper merge". Move over early and wait your turn like everyone else.

entry.title: /int/ International: I'm a Russian draft-dodger incel who escaped the Russian matriarchy, and in a we…
entry.content: I'm a Russian draft-dodger incel who escaped the Russian matriarchy, and in a week I'm flying out of Georgia to Vietnam via Kazakhstan. Since finding a girl here is basically impossible and prostitution is way too expensive, I'm heading to a country with better geomaxxing potential. Plus, in Southeast Asia it's much easier to get stronger pharmacy meds and drugs that are banned here or prescription-only. Anyway, Georgia is a wonderful country, and the best part is that the government services ar

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What's the use case for AI jailbreaking beyond wank material & making spaghetti …
entry.content: What's the use case for AI jailbreaking beyond wank material & making spaghetti code viruses? Not that I think AI should be locked down, but all other frowned upon/potentially prohibited uses it's genuinely bad at anyway. It fucking sucks at chemistry for example and things like learning how to launder money are pretty easy to find through conventional means. Am I missing something or does the whole scene start and end with coomers and script kiddies?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I live in a shithole where fuel is expensive and wages are low. I did the math a…
entry.content: I live in a shithole where fuel is expensive and wages are low. I did the math and comparing fuel prices + purchasing power, 1us gallong of gasoline comes out to about $20usd where I live. So what would you buy if gas was $20 a gallon and you had a budget of about 30kusd? i dont wanna drive a cuckcar but buying a v8 truck is financial suicide here

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I need some advice /mu/. When I was younger, I made a lot of music that was sold…
entry.content: I need some advice /mu/. When I was younger, I made a lot of music that was sold on and re-record by some famous musicians. I also did remixes for people and videos too. I’ve been in and out of hospital for 10 years and didn’t have the chance to chase up on the money I would’ve got for it until recently. It turns out I had a trust fund setup and it was switched to an ISA on my 18th birthday but it wasn’t me that did this, and it would’ve needed to be me that changed and not the account proprieto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: fucker is eating half my RAM
entry.content: I’ve literally got one single tab open in my browser and the fucker is eating half my RAM. How much RAM is yours using? Can you send a screenshot and suggest a fix? And don’t give me that ‘unused RAM is wasted RAM’ bullshit, because I can’t even launch Ratchet & Clank due to lack of memory. And don’t even start with Linux.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why are these games so freakishly boring?
entry.content: Something about them just gives me the iiiiiccckkkkkkk > is it the bad level design? > is it the repetitive bullet spongey gameplay? > is it the nagging dialogue and the EXTREMELY overrated, unfunny characters (ie handsome jack, ellie, lillith, etc etc etc) > is it the atrocious vehicle controls? ... > IS IT RANDY PITCHFORD?!

entry.title: /b/ Random: Just apply everything you know today to the present since it's so important. Thi…
entry.content: Just apply everything you know today to the present since it's so important. This kind of thinking doesn't even make sense because everything you know today is the result of everything you didn't know back then, so wanting to change the past is just an idea that you shouldn't have gone through everything you went through, which is foolish. Forgive yourself and accept that things were as they were. Every second you spend thinking about it is a valuable second that you stop spending on something m

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: HERE IS HOW TO SPEAK TO...
entry.content: You can use ancient and dying languages, including Sanskrit and Old Chinese, to bypass most AI. The issue is obvious: they have no data to determine if it's safe. There are no conversations to reference, no slang. However, they have information about the language, and latent spaces are how the AI communicates. Look this all up. Most days, it will try to divert you, but if you ask in an honest way and say "What's up with that new precedent where people are using dying and ancient languages to byp

entry.content: >McDonald’s meat is bad for you!!!! When will this MYTH die??? At least in the case of the Quarter Pounder…the EXACT OPPOSITE is true Quarter Pounders come with 100% fresh, never-frozen beef with no fillers, additives, or preservatives I should also mention: The Beef used in Quarter Pounders is grilled on a flat-top griddle with no added oil, butter, or fat This is all easily verifiable btw

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 2 Cell
entry.content: The fucking genius created the PlayStation and PS2 and PS3. Unfortunately, many people here insult the PS3 without even knowing that it created the foundation for previous games. Just think if he had placed 2 Cell processors instead of 1, or 4 right away; only then the console would consume 500 watts, but it would be worth it for advanced physics

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Wikipedia is having another meltdown about Co-Founder Larry Sanger and are plann…
entry.content: Wikipedia is having another meltdown about Co-Founder Larry Sanger and are planning to ban him from his own project. Wikipedia is in the "kill the beast" mode especially after two other recent admin rebellions and the fact that there are now massive vandal gangs using residential proxies to attack the site 24/7 (the block log is full of really ridiculous usernames now). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikip edia:Administrators%27_noticeboard/ Incidents#Possible_off-wiki_canvass ing_by_User:Larry_S

entry.title: /news/ News: Amy Acton outraises Vivek Ramaswamy in 2026
entry.content: Candidates filed their latest campaign finance reports last Friday, disclosing their campaign fundraising and spending from April 16 through June 12. The reports provided a look at their last-minute spending ahead of the May 5 primary election. The documents will also be the last financial look behind the curtain until October. Republican entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy quickly jumped out to a massive fundraising lead last year after launching his campaign. But Dr. Amy Acton, the Democratic former

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: hmm sometimes I get rather annoyed at having a heated toilet seat and bidet, bec…
entry.content: hmm sometimes I get rather annoyed at having a heated toilet seat and bidet, because sometimes I like to pretend I’m a caveman by doing stuff like throwing random things around with my pants off -- but then, when I sit down on my heated toilet seat while at it, it makes it really hard not to remember I’m actually quite civilized and not some primitive ape

entry.title: /mu/ Music: There is no hard rock or heavy metal band that rips it harder than April Wine. N…
entry.content: There is no hard rock or heavy metal band that rips it harder than April Wine. Name any random metal band, AC/DC, Judas Priest, Van Halen, they mostly have slow songs. April Wine has mostly all high energy rippers that you just jam out to. Miles the lead singer left the band just as they finally made it world wide out of burn out from so much touring. They had so much potential if they would have kept going. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=usW QOPTORn8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ylc Y_enzwm

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is plastic surgery getting out of control in Hollywood or is it simply more visi…
entry.content: Is plastic surgery getting out of control in Hollywood or is it simply more visible these days? Even male actors are getting extreme face lips and fillers. What's causing this phenomenon? Cheaper access to surgeons? I thought the woke movement was supposed to prevent this stuff but it feels like it's worse than ever before.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Brian Duffield Rumored To Be Writing New Alien Film
entry.content: >According to a report from writer Daniel Richtman, it sounds as if Brian Duffield (No One Will Save You, The Babysitter, Spontaneous), is writing a new Alien film for 20th Century Studios. Richtman notes that at this time, it’s unclear if Duffield will direct the film, as well. The news come on the heels of Duffield’s adaptation of Daniel Kraus’ novel, Whalefall, set to hit theaters this October. >If true, Duffield is someone who may not have been the first to come to mind for a new Alien franc
